oidcErrorAccessDenied: Sign-in was canceled or denied by your identity provider.
oidcErrorInvalidCallback: The authentication callback was invalid. Please try again.
oidcErrorMissingState: The sign-in session expired. Please start sign-in again.
oidcErrorProviderNotFound: The selected identity provider is unavailable.
oidcErrorEmailNotVerified: Your identity provider did not confirm a verified email address.
oidcErrorSignupDisabled: Automatic account creation is disabled for this provider.
oidcErrorInternalError: A server error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.
oidcErrorAccountCreationFailed: Your account could not be created. Please contact an administrator.
oidcErrorAccountLinkingFailed: Your account could not be linked. Please contact an administrator.
oidcErrorAccountUpdateFailed: Your account could not be updated. Please contact an administrator.
oidcErrorProviderEmailConflict: Another account is already linked to this identity provider with the same email. Please contact an administrator.
oidcErrorTokenGenerationFailed: Sign-in failed while creating your session. Please try again.
validationNameMinLength: Name must be at least 3 characters
validationNameMaxLength: Name must be at most 64 characters
validationPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validationPasswordMaxLength: Password must be at most 128 characters
createAdminAccountDescription: Set up the first admin account to get started
name: Name
noLoginMethodsAvailable: No login methods are currently available. Please contact your administrator.
